overview: HireNest Command Center is a compact, unified CRM for staffing and recruiting teams. It centralizes Vendors, Clients, Recruiters, and Candidates into a single approval-gated command center with visual pipeline Kanban boards, a real-time Pulse dashboard, rule-based follow-up engine, and a morning briefing derived from live data.
features: Visual Kanban pipelines per entity type with drag-and-drop stage movement
Approval-gated workflows: offers, negotiations, onboarding, follow-ups
HireNest Pulse dashboard with color-coded health scores (Green/Yellow/Red)
Rule-based follow-up engine with approval queue
Morning briefing computed from live backend state
Recruiter daily check-ins and activity logging
Job orders and candidate submissions management
